product_overview: Homebit is a modern web platform designed to seamlessly connect households, househelp, and agencies for home service management. It provides authentication, profile setup, booking, communication, and payment features optimized for a smooth user experience with server-side rendering, real-time notifications, and role-based access.
core_goals: Provide a unified platform for households and househelp to manage profiles and services.
Offer secure authentication with session persistence and Google OAuth integration.
Enable profile setup gating to ensure complete user information before accessing core features.
Facilitate hiring workflows including requests, contracts, and negotiations between households and househelp.
Support real-time communication through inbox and notifications with WebSocket integration.
Implement subscription and payment management for service plans.
Deliver a responsive, role-aware user interface with theme preferences and customization.
Ensure high performance with SSR, client-side optimizations, and web vitals monitoring.
key_features: React Router-based SSR app shell with environment injection and global providers.
File-based routing with flat route conventions for scalable navigation.
Client-side authentication with localStorage token management and protected routes.
Profile setup gating to enforce profile completeness for authenticated flows.
Dark and light theme support with localStorage persistence and backend sync.
Centralized API configuration with endpoint catalog and secure fetch wrappers.
Responsive and role-aware navigation showing user-specific counts and theme toggle.
Waitlist modal supporting both Google Identity Services and server-verified OAuth flows.
Public marketing pages including home, about, services, contact, terms, privacy, cookies, and pricing.
Household and househelp dashboards and profile management with public profile views.
Comprehensive hiring workflows for requests, contracts, and negotiations.
Inbox with real-time notifications via WebSocket and unread count tracking.
Subscription plan browsing, checkout, and subscription management workflows.
Optimized image upload and media handling components.
Client-side UX helpers for animations, lazy loading, formatting, and validation.
Performance instrumentation logging web vitals metrics.
Express-based production SSR server with static asset serving and API proxy middleware.
user_flow_summary: User visits marketing site pages for information and sign-up prompts.
User initiates authentication via email/password or Google OAuth flows, including waitlist sign-up.
Authenticated users complete profile setup workflows (household or househelp) before accessing application.
Users access role-based dashboards to manage profiles, bookings, and view public profiles.
Households and househelp engage in hiring workflows involving requests, contracts, and message-based negotiations.
Users send and receive messages via inbox with real-time notifications enabled by WebSocket.
Users browse subscription plans, manage their subscriptions, and complete payments via integrated payment workflows.
Theme preferences can be toggled and persisted between sessions and synced with backend for authenticated users.
validation_criteria: Authentication flows must securely store tokens and enforce route protection.
Profile setup gating correctly restricts access until profiles are complete.
Google OAuth integrations via both client and server flows function smoothly and prefill user data as expected.
Hiring workflows enable end-to-end request, contract, and negotiation functionality.
Real-time notifications and inbox update with minimal latency using WebSocket connections.
Subscription and payment flows complete with accurate status updates and error handling.
Responsive UI reflects user roles, states, and preferences dynamically.
Uploaded images are handled optimally with components supporting media management.
Performance metrics are collected and logged for web vitals without impacting user experience.
SSR server properly serves routes, static assets, and proxies API requests in production environment.

features.name: App shell + SSR entry
features.description: React Router SSR entry points and root document wrapper; provides ENV injection, theme pre-hydration script, and global providers (Auth/Theme/ProfileSetup/WebSocket).

features.name: File-based routing (flat routes)
features.description: Routes are discovered from app/routes using @react-router/fs-routes flatRoutes convention.

features.name: Authentication + session persistence
features.description: Client-side auth provider manages login/signup/logout and verifies session against auth API; stores token and user_object in localStorage and protects routes.

features.name: Profile setup gating
features.description: Guards authenticated flows to ensure househelp/household profiles complete required setup steps; redirects into setup flows.

features.name: Theme system (dark/light) + preferences sync
features.description: ThemeProvider applies theme to document root, persists to localStorage, and optionally syncs to backend preferences for authenticated routes.

features.name: API configuration + endpoint catalog
features.description: Centralized service base URLs (auth/notifications/payments) and endpoints; provides helper for auth headers and fetch wrapper.

features.name: Navigation + role-aware UI
features.description: Responsive navigation with conditional rendering for app subdomain, auth state, profile type, shortlist/inbox/hiring counts, and theme toggle.

features.name: Waitlist + Google OAuth callback flows
features.description: Waitlist modal with form submission and Google sign-in flows (GSI + server-verified redirect OAuth) and callback routes.

features.name: Marketing site pages
features.description: Public marketing pages and content routes (home, about, services, contact, terms, privacy, cookies, pricing).

features.name: Household and househelp dashboards/profiles
features.description: Authenticated dashboards and profile management pages for household and househelp roles; includes public profile views.

features.name: Hiring workflows
features.description: Hiring requests/contracts/negotiations flows; household and househelp views.

features.name: Inbox + realtime notifications
features.description: Inbox UI and WebSocket integration to notifications service; tracks unread counts and listens for message events.

features.name: Payments and subscriptions
features.description: Subscription plan browsing, subscription management and payment initiation/status flows (payments service).

features.name: Image upload and media handling
features.description: Client utilities and endpoints for image upload/user images management; includes optimized image component.

features.name: Client-side UX helpers
features.description: Scroll-triggered animations, lazy loading helpers, formatting and validation utilities.

features.name: Performance instrumentation
features.description: Collects and logs web-vitals metrics from client entry.

features.name: SSR Express server + API proxy
features.description: Express server for production SSR, health endpoints, static asset serving, and /api proxy middleware.
